'''鈭歫-p-ch-sh''' ('''kajapcheshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:forebring|forebring]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-p-ch-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:forebring|forebring]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-p-ch-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kajapcheshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijapcheshoko|thijapcheshoko]] || [[word:jijapcheshoko|jijapcheshoko]] || [[word:shijapcheshoko|shijapcheshoko]] || [[word:kijapcheshoko|kijapcheshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujapcheshoko|thuthujapcheshoko]] || [[word:jujujapcheshoko|jujujapcheshoko]] || [[word:shushujapcheshoko|shushujapcheshoko]] || [[word:kukujapcheshoko|kukujapcheshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujapcheshoko|thujapcheshoko]] || [[word:jujapcheshoko|jujapcheshoko]] || [[word:shujapcheshoko|shujapcheshoko]] || [[word:kujapcheshoko|kujapcheshoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojapcheshoko|thojapcheshoko]] || [[word:jojapcheshoko|jojapcheshoko]] || [[word:shojapcheshoko|shojapcheshoko]] || [[word:kojapcheshoko|kojapcheshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojapcheshoko|thojapcheshoko]] || [[word:jojapcheshoko|jojapcheshoko]] || [[word:shojapcheshoko|shojapcheshoko]] || [[word:kojapcheshoko|kojapcheshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙japcheshoko|th忙japcheshoko]] || [[word:j忙japcheshoko|j忙japcheshoko]] || [[word:sh忙japcheshoko|sh忙japcheshoko]] || [[word:k忙japcheshoko|k忙japcheshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajapcheshoko|thathajapcheshoko]] || [[word:jajajapcheshoko|jajajapcheshoko]] || [[word:shashajapcheshoko|shashajapcheshoko]] || [[word:kakajapcheshoko|kakajapcheshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajapcheshoko|thajapcheshoko]] || [[word:jajapcheshoko|jajapcheshoko]] || [[word:shajapcheshoko|shajapcheshoko]] || [[word:kajapcheshoko|kajapcheshoko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shajapcheshithi|shajapcheshithi]] || [[word:shajapcheshiji|shajapcheshiji]] || [[word:shajapcheshishi|shajapcheshishi]] || [[word:shajapcheshiki|shajapcheshiki]]
